official_functions.role: Construct, write, decode, and observe the official Play clientbound ticking_step body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns ticking_step to packet id 0x80.
The official ticking_step body is one VarInt tickSteps field.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, tickSteps field, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer TickRateManager runtime semantics.
